description_long: This is an elegant, classic-style sofa with a gently curved backrest and rolled armrests, upholstered in a smooth, light beige fabric. The sofa features a single, seamless seat cushion and four loose, square pillows in matching fabric, arranged symmetrically for comfort and style. The armrests are generously padded and rolled outward, giving the piece a luxurious and inviting appearance. The base of the sofa is accented with a subtle gold trim, and it stands on six turned wooden legs with a gold finish, adding a touch of sophistication. The back of the sofa is fully upholstered and plain, maintaining a clean and refined look from all angles. This piece would be well-suited for upscale urban environments such as hotel lobbies, boutique waiting areas, or stylish outdoor patios under cover.
description: A classic, light beige sofa with rolled armrests, gold-accented turned legs, and four matching loose pillows. Its elegant design and plush upholstery make it ideal for sophisticated urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full seat, four loose pillows, rolled armrests, and gold-accented legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the seat, the rolled armrest profile, and the arrangement of the pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, fully upholstered back and the gold trim along the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the armrest curve and pillow arrangement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One large, seamless seat cushion with four loose, square back cushions arranged symmetrically; all cushions are uniform in size and unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, high and rolled outward with generous padding, matching the height of the backrest and featuring a classic, rounded profile.
attribute_leg_design: Six turned wooden legs with a gold finish, positioned at the four corners and two central points for support; legs are exposed and feature a traditional, decorative style.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest with a gentle curve, fully upholstered and unsegmented, without tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light beige fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
